25852183.title: List of members of the Riksdag, 1998–2002

pageprops.defaultsort: List of members of the parliament of Sweden, 1998-2002

25852183.extract: This is a list of members of the Riksdag, the national parliament of Sweden. The Riksdag is a unicameral assembly with 349 members of parliament (Swedish: riksdagsledamöter), who are elected on a proportional basis to serve fixed terms of four years. In the Riksdag, members are seated per constituency and not party. The following MPs were elected in the 1998 Swedish general election.
